rag_rules: Fuse port-facing contract content into a valid component type scope; fuse implementation-only bindings into the matching implementation scope.
Use the input AADL model as the authority for owners, names, ports, subcomponents, and connections when attaching an annex.
Preserve the existing AADL architecture; add the annex without changing unrelated structural declarations.
generic_rules: Match the annex owner to the symbols the block needs to see.
Keep existing declarations, properties, connections, and unrelated ordering intact during fusion.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE blocks use the wrapper: annex agree {** ... **};
Implementation-scope annex content should appear after the implementation structure it depends on.
anti_patterns: Do not place an annex in a scope where its referenced names are not visible.
Do not fuse subcomponent-port references into a component-type contract unless those values are exposed through valid interface symbols.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
